results.trackName: Don't Fall in Love With Me
results.description:
Your next escapist summer read. A scorching new romance from the Sunday Times bestselling author of Seven Summers and Only Love Can Hurt Like This, perfect for fans of Colleen Hoover and JoJo Moyes

‘The queen of emotional love stories’ Beth O’Leary
‘Poignant, powerful, passionate’ Milly Johnson
‘One of my must-buy authors’ Abby Jimenez

***********************************

What if the person you love the most is the one you can’t have?

Grace has loved Jackson since she was fifteen – when they spent every childhood summer exploring France's breathtaking Ardèche region together. They were best friends, until life took its course and Jackson married someone else.

Years later, Jackson re-enters Grace’s life with an irresistible offer: her dream job in the very town where their story began. And he’s newly single.

As memories from those idyllic summers flood back, Grace encounters an old friend Étienne, who proposes a plan to help make Jackson jealous. But as their scheme unfolds, Grace finds herself questioning if the sparks between them might not be so pretend after all…

Unbeknownst to Grace, Étienne is harbouring a secret that could shatter her world.

Will learning the truth finally set her heart free?
Or is this the beginning of a love story bigger than she ever imagined?

*******************************************************

PRAISE FOR DON'T FALL IN LOVE WITH ME . . .

‘Another heartfelt, beautiful romance from the queen of emotional love stories.’ Beth O’Leary

‘So beautiful. A heartwarming love story in the most romantic of settings. Off to get me a kayak’ Giovanna Fletcher

‘A sweeping love story. . . Paige Toon has complete control of my heart.’ Annabel Monaghan

‘Poignant, Powerful, Passionate. I think this is my favourite one of hers yet. This book is HOT.’ Milly Johnson

‘Emotional and seductive, this is sun-drenched perfection. I loved every word!’ Heidi Swain

‘A gorgeous, heartfelt spin on friends-to-lovers and coming of age romance. You will love Paige Toon!’ Kristan Higgins

‘A lush, addictive love story with sizzling chemistry and a twist I didn’t see coming – prepare for heart-melting heat!’ Jill Shalvis

'Paige had my heart yearning for the stunning setting and for love to conquer all. A triumph!' Zoe Folbigg

‘No-one writes a love story quite like Paige Toon.’ Heat, Book of the Month

‘A gorgeous, perfect holiday read.’ Closer

‘Paige Toon delivers a heart-warming tale of love, friendship, passion and family.’ Woman's Weekly

‘A page-turning romance.’ Woman

‘A gorgeous, multi-layered love story.' The Sun
